flight_origin_destination_must_differ: origin and destination must be different
flight_origin_invalid_airport: origin is not a valid airport code
flight_destination_invalid_airport: destination is not a valid airport code
offer_id_inbound_not_allowed: offer_id_inbound is not allowed for one_way
offer_id_outbound_not_found: offer_id_outbound does not exist in outbound offers
offer_id_outbound_invalid_direction: offer_id_outbound is not an outbound offer
offer_id_inbound_not_found: offer_id_inbound does not exist in inbound offers
offer_id_inbound_invalid_direction: offer_id_inbound is not an inbound offer
offer_id_inbound_invalid_route: offer_id_inbound does not reverse the outbound route
offer_departure_sequence_invalid: outbound departure_at must be earlier than inbound departure_at
passengers_required: passengers must be a non-empty list
booking_create_rate_limited: You have created more than 5 bookings. Please try again after 1 hour.
dob_invalid_format: dob must be a valid date in YYYY-MM-DD format
dob_too_young: dob must be at least 14 days before today
passengers_email_duplicate: each passenger email must be unique
passengers_phone_duplicate: each passenger phone must be unique
passengers_passport_no_duplicate: each passenger passport_no must be unique
upstream_rate_limited: Legacy service rate limited the request
upstream_bad_payload: Legacy service returned an invalid payload
